CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, content String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello, world!'), (2, 'hello, universe!'), (3, 'Goodbye, world!'), (4, 'HELLO, everyone!');
SELECT id, positionCaseInsensitive(content, 'world') AS pos FROM test_strings WHERE pos > 0;
SELECT id, content FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(content, 'goodbye') = 1;
WITH (SELECT count(*) FROM test_strings) AS total_count SELECT positionCaseInsensitive(content, 'universe') AS position, total_count FROM test_strings;

SELECT t1.id, positionCaseInsensitive(t1.content, t2.sub) AS found_position FROM test_strings t1 JOIN (SELECT 'hello' AS sub UNION ALL SELECT 'world') t2 ON positionCaseInsensitive(t1.content, t2.sub) > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_results (id UInt32, found_position Int32);
INSERT INTO test_results SELECT id, positionCaseInsensitive(content, 'hello') FROM test_strings WHERE positionCaseInsensitive(content, 'hello') > 0;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_results WHERE found_position > 0;
SELECT id, content, positionCaseInsensitive(content, 'HELLO') AS pos FROM test_strings WHERE pos IS NOT NULL;
